metadata.title: THEREDA CAPP 2022 Pitzer Aqueous Extract
metadata.description: ThermML reformulation of the AQUEOUS/PIMZ phase from THEREDA_CAPP_221026.dat. Only the Pitzer aqueous phase is represented here; non-aqueous ChemSage phases in the source DAT are outside this example file.

references.reference: Parameter File for ChemApp produced from THEREDA - 2022-10-21 10:46:36 L
Generated ThermML example stores ChemSage excess records verbatim in property comments for review.

phase.name: AQUEOUS
phase.description: AQUEOUS PIMZ phase extracted from THEREDA_CAPP_221026.dat: 42 species/endmembers and 185 Pitzer interaction records. ChemSage pseudo-component EA is omitted from ThermML systemComponents and retained only in endmember comments.
